interpretation_limits: Cobb angle and curve-specific corrections cannot be calculated from photographs of an old monitor image.
Consumer foot-to-foot BIA is used as a rough trend only; body-fat and lean-mass values are not treated as diagnostic.
No unilateral seat wedge, shoe lift, or side-specific strengthening is prescribed without current standing imaging and clinician assessment.
